name: N.E.R.V. Evangelion Unit-01 Mechanical Keyboard
description: Custom mechanical keyboard featuring a matte gray frame and a white keycap set with unique 'NO REDRAW' lime-green escape key, N.E.R.V. logo key, and small integrated screen. Part of a limited production run.

name: Artisan Keycaps Treasures - Retro Gaming Layout
description: Unique mechanical keyboard setup showcasing individual custom artisan keycaps and standard keycaps with varied iconography including retro camera, power, and media controls. Comes with additional keys in a tray.

name: Evangelion Unit-01 Custom Mechanical Keyboard with Coiled Cable
description: Custom mechanical keyboard with a split purple and green color scheme, detailed with stylized Japanese text and iconography. Features purple key backlighting and a purple coiled cable on a topo map pattern desk mat.

name: Custom Samurai Warrior Themed Keyboard
description: Custom mechanical keyboard featuring dark wood frame and unique burgundy/gold keycaps with white legends and integrated golden cloud patterns. Features unique stylized samurai/onibi artisan keycaps in top left and a black coiled cable.

name: Starfield Limited Edition Xbox Controller
description: Starfield-themed custom Xbox wireless controller featuring a retro-futuristic aesthetic with blue and orange accents, stylized control panel text, and a golden faceted D-pad. Comes with themed packaging.

name: Xbox Series S Console - Flame Hand-Painted Edition
description: Hand-painted Xbox Series S console and controller set featuring a dynamic black and yellow flame pattern against a white background. Hand-painted details make each set unique.

name: Mr Bushido Series X Console - Limited Run
description: Mr Bushido-themed Xbox Series X console and controller featuring a detailed samurai silhouette against a crimson sun and ancient architectural patterns. Exclusive collector's edition with special Mr Bushido branding.

name: Ragnarok Wolf & Bear DualSense Controllers (Set of 2)
description: A pair of custom DualSense controllers featuring stylized designs: one in blue with a double wolf sigil, the other in white/red with a bear sigil. Inspired by Ragnarok mythology and characters.

name: GTA VI Vice City Neon PS5 DualSense Controller with Standard Packaging
description: Custom PS5 DualSense controller featuring vibrant neon pink, orange, and blue retro wave graphics, including palm trees and 'VI' logo, inspired by Vice City. Includes a custom PS5 display stand.

name: Ghost of Yōtei Collectors DualSense Controller
description: Ghost of Yōtei-themed DualSense controller with a subtle cream frame and striking gold leaf brushstroke patterns. Features golden Japanese character iconography and unique themed packaging.

name: Cuphead Xbox One Console and Controller Bundle
description: Special edition Xbox One S bundle featuring a 'Cuphead' themed console and wireless controller. The console and controller are bright yellow with hand-drawn Cuphead and Mugman graphics. The controller has red D-pad and triggers, blue face buttons and analog sticks, and includes 'DON'T DEAL WITH THE DEVIL' text.

name: Custom Naruto Akatsuki PS4 Controller
description: Custom DualShock 4 controller for PlayStation 4, featuring a striking black and red design inspired by the Akatsuki organization from the 'Naruto' anime series. The controller has a matte black shell adorned with the iconic red Akatsuki clouds. The central touchpad is finished in silver and engraved with the hidden leaf village symbol crossed out.

name: Panic Playdate Handheld Console
description: A unique, bright yellow handheld gaming system developed by Panic. It features a black-and-white high-contrast screen, a control pad, 'A' and 'B' buttons, and a mechanical crank on the side for unique game input. Shown running the game 'Lost Your Marbles'.

name: MelGeek Pixel Mechanical Keyboard
description: Custom mechanical keyboard in a white frame with white, black, and grey keycaps, on a technical grid desk mat. It features a red segment display near the spacebar with '9-0'CLOCK' text and orange-stem switches on the side.

name: GravaStar Mercury K1 Pro Mechanical Keyboard
description: Mechanical gaming keyboard with a futuristic, sci-fi inspired design. It has an angular, metallic-looking frame with visible wires and mechanical details, supported by tripod legs. Features dynamic RGB backlighting with blue, purple, and pink LEDs and transparent keycaps on the right side.

name: DURGOD K84 9-O'CLOCK Mechanical Keyboard (Close-up)
description: Detailed close-up view of a mechanical keyboard on a technical blueprint mat. Focus is on the bottom edge featuring a bright red illuminated digital display showing 'K:84 DURGOD 9-O'CLOCK' and a silver volume wheel in a protective black cage.

name: GameBoy Phone Case Controller
description: Protective case for a smartphone with an integrated, functional GameBoy-style controller on the back. Made of clear plastic, it has a separate small monochrome screen, a d-pad, and buttons, allowing the user to play retro games.

name: Anbernic RG35XX Retro Handheld Game Console
description: A horizontal retro gaming handheld shown in two versions: solid orange and transparent black. It has a vertical form factor with a 3.5-inch screen and standard retro gamepad buttons (d-pad, A/B/X/Y, start/select). It is designed to emulate classic game consoles.

name: Miyoo Mini+ (Plus) Retro Handheld Console
description: A compact retro gaming handheld with a transparent purple shell. It has a high-resolution 3.5-inch screen and is shown resting on a dark, patterned desk mat next to a white wireless mouse and keyboard.

name: Handheld Console with Screen Overlay
description: A metallic blue vertical handheld gaming device being held, featuring a large screen and standard retro controls. It has an additional small pixel-art display on top. The main screen shows a scene from the 'Metal Slug' arcade game.
